# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for istio egress unrestricted and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-provider.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.payment-provider.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.payment-provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.thirdparty.io
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-analytics-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.thirdparty.io
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - analytics.thirdparty.io
    route:
    - destination:
        host: analytics.thirdparty.io
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.cloud
  addresses:
  - 10.240.0.0/16
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "reporting-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - postgres.external-db.cloud
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "reporting-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: postgres.external-db.cloud
        port:
          number: 5432
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.cloud
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.cloud
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 6379
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis.external-cache.cloud
        port:
          number: 6379
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.notification-service.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-notification-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.notification-service.com
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.notification-service.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.notification-service.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-storage-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - storage.cloud-provider.com
  - "*.storage.cloud-provider.com"
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "upload-service"
  - "backup-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-storage-api
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - storage.cloud-provider.com
  - "*.storage.cloud-provider.com"
  exportTo:
  - "upload-service"
  - "backup-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - storage.cloud-provider.com
      - "*.storage.cloud-provider.com"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: storage.cloud-provider.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-egress-policy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/*"
    - "./*"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: istio-egressgateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: egressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 443
      name: tls-egress
      protocol: TLS
    hosts:
    - api.payment-provider.com
    - analytics.thirdparty.io
    - api.notification-service.com
    - storage.cloud-provider.com
    - "*.storage.cloud-provider.com"
    tls:
      mode: PASSTHROUGH

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-payment-api-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: api.payment-provider.com
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: SIMPLE
      sni: api.payment-provider.com
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
        connectTimeout: 30s
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 50
        http2MaxRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 2
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-postgres-db-dr
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  host: postgres.external-db.cloud
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "reporting-service"
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 50
        connectTimeout: 10s
        tcpKeepalive:
          time: 7200s
          interval: 75s
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 3
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-payment-api-authz
  namespace: payment-service
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/payment-service/sa/payment-service-sa
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - api.payment-provider.com
        ports:
        - "443"

---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: egress-db-authz
  namespace: backend-service
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/backend-service/sa/backend-service-sa
        - cluster.local/ns/reporting-service/sa/reporting-service-sa
    to:
    - operation:
        hosts:
        - postgres.external-db.cloud
        ports:
        - "5432"
